results.title: Cal.com
results.description: Cal.com is the open-source Calendly successor, offering self-hosted or hosted scheduling infrastructure with full control over data, workflow, and appearance.

results.title: Cal.com API
results.description: The Cal.com API provides programmatic access to manage scheduling functionalities, including attendees, bookings, availabilities, event types, and more, with API key authentication.

results.title: Vega Embed
results.description: Vega-Embed simplifies embedding interactive Vega and Vega-Lite visualizations into web pages, supporting various spec sources and offering features like action links and integrated tooltips/themes.

results.title: Cal.com Cal Provider
results.description: Cal Provider is a component used to set up scheduling capabilities within React or Next.js applications, integrated at the root of the app to manage user access and configuration.

results.title: SvelteKit Embed
results.description: A collection of embed components for SvelteKit, designed to load content when it scrolls into the viewport, supporting various platforms like YouTube, Spotify, and more.

results.title: cuEmbed
results.description: cuEmbed is an open-source, header-only CUDA kernel library that accelerates embedding lookup by maximizing memory bandwidth utilization for high performance in CUDA programs.

results.title: EmbedJS
results.description: A NodeJS RAG framework to easily work with LLMs and embeddings

results.title: CSnakes
results.description: Embed Python in .NET

results.title: Webtor.io Embed SDK
results.description: A JavaScript SDK by Webtor.io for embedding online torrent streaming capabilities directly into websites, supporting various video formats, subtitles, and requiring no external plugins.

results.title: Looker Embed SDK
results.description: Facilitates embedding Looker content like Dashboards, Looks, Explores, Reports, and Extensions into web applications, simplifying communication and interaction.

results.title: Obsidian Link Embed
results.description: A plugin that converts URLs in Obsidian notes into embedded previews with metadata, images, and favicons from multiple supported parsers.

results.title: Lite YouTube
results.description: A web component that renders YouTube embeds faster, built as the Shadow DOM version of Paul Irish's lite-youtube-embed.

results.title: Kota Embed
results.description: Kota Embed enables platforms to seamlessly integrate Kota's compliant, cutting-edge health insurance, life assurance, and retirement benefits services for their customers using APIs and an Embed SDK.

results.title: PostgreSQL Embedded
results.description: Embed PostgreSQL database

results.title: FastEmbed
results.description: FastEmbed is a lightweight and fast Python library for generating text and image embeddings, supporting various models and optimized for speed and efficiency.

results.title: Embed Manifest
results.description: Embed Manifest is a Rust crate that provides a straightforward way to embed Windows manifests in executables without external dependencies, enabling proper Windows compatibility settings.

results.title: Shadcn Cal.com
results.description: A Next.js project bootstrapped with create-next-app, featuring optimized font loading and deployment on Vercel.

results.title: Framepack
results.description: Lets make video diffusion practical!

results.title: Cal-Heatmap
results.description: Cal-Heatmap is a JavaScript charting library for creating time-series calendar heatmaps with features like animated navigation, custom time intervals, and locale support.

results.title: CefSharp
results.description: CefSharp is a lightweight .NET wrapper for the Chromium Embedded Framework (CEF), enabling developers to embed a Chromium browser into .NET applications for WPF and WinForms.

results.title: FastEmbed-rs
results.description: FastEmbed-rs is a Rust library for generating vector embeddings and reranking locally, utilizing ONNX inference and fast tokenization.

results.title: Sigma Embed-SDK for React
results.description: The Sigma Embed-SDK for React provides a higher-level, developer-friendly interface, including React hooks, to simplify the integration of Sigma systems into applications, building upon the lower-level JavaScript Embed-API.

results.title: mpv.js
results.description: mpv.js is an embeddable player for Electron/NW.js applications, powered by the mpv media player, supporting all formats.

results.title: EmbedPDF Viewer
results.description: EmbedPDF is an open-source, framework-agnostic JavaScript PDF viewer that integrates seamlessly into any JavaScript project, offering features like annotations, redaction, search, and virtualized scrolling.

results.title: EmbedAnything
results.description: EmbedAnything is a fast, lightweight, and multimodal embedding pipeline in Rust for generating and streaming embeddings from various data sources to vector databases.

results.title: Capacitor Video Player
results.description: A custom native Capacitor plugin for playing videos fullscreen on iOS, Android, Web, and Electron, and embedded on Web and Electron.

results.title: FFmpeg.wasm
results.description: FFmpeg for browser, powered by WebAssembly

results.title: Mbed TLS
results.description: Mbed TLS is a C library implementing cryptographic primitives, X.509 certificate manipulation, and SSL/TLS and DTLS protocols, suitable for embedded systems due to its small code footprint.

results.title: WilliamCallahan.com
results.description: This repository contains the code for William Callahan's personal website, featuring an interactive terminal, hydration safety patterns, and efficient logo fetching with caching.

results.title: Adobe Express Embed SDK
results.description: The Adobe Express Embed SDK lets you integrate powerful online design tools, photo editing features, video editing options, and AI-powered content generation into your platform.
